caption: The video appears to be a presentation or lecture, likely focused on systems thinking and its applications. The screen displays a complex diagram with various interconnected nodes, each representing different concepts such as "awaken," "systems thinking," "models and methods," "model sharing," "what people do," "buying & selling," "fight club," "leadership," "how people think," "we have a problem," and "future of society." These nodes are linked by arrows, suggesting relationships and processes between them. In the center, there is an image of a figure sitting next to a large question mark, symbolizing inquiry or the need for understanding. The presenter, visible in a small window on the right side of the screen, seems to be explaining the diagram, possibly discussing how these elements interact within a larger system. The setting suggests an educational or professional context, aimed at exploring complex issues through a systems perspective.
